summary: MT5 Integration testing completed. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: MT5 page loads with status cards, student linking table, sync history, and manual sync button. Role access correctly enforced - mentors cannot access MT5 endpoints (403) and are redirected away from /mt5 page. Fixed a bug in link-student endpoint where students without mt5_account_number field were incorrectly reported as 'not found'.
passed_tests: GET /api/mt5/status returns connection info, credentials status, linked count, schedule (admin)
GET /api/mt5/linked-students returns paginated students with search
GET /api/mt5/linked-students search filters by name/email/phone/MT5 ID
PUT /api/mt5/link-student successfully links student to MT5 account
PUT /api/mt5/link-student duplicate check: cannot link same MT5 to two students (400)
PUT /api/mt5/unlink-student removes MT5 account from student
POST /api/mt5/sync triggers withdrawal sync (returns auth_failed as expected)
All MT5 endpoints return 403 for mentor role
Frontend MT5 page loads at /mt5 with all components
Frontend status cards show server, linked students, last sync, schedule
Frontend student linking table with search and Link buttons
Frontend link dialog opens with MT5 account input
Frontend sync history tab shows recent sync runs
Frontend sidebar shows MT5 Integration under Operations for admin
MT5 Integration link NOT visible to mentors in sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: server.py line 27282 - Added 'id' to projection in link-student query to prevent false 'Student not found' errors when student exists but has no mt5_account_number field
server.py line 27227: ADMIN_CS_ROLES correctly excludes mentor roles
server.py lines 27349-27460: _run_mt5_withdrawal_sync correctly handles auth_failed status when Web API not enabled
MT5SyncPage.jsx: Well-structured with status cards, tabs, search, and link dialog
App.js line 293-297: ProtectedRoute correctly restricts /mt5 to admin/CS roles
Layout.jsx line 187: MT5 Integration link correctly scoped to admin/CS roles in sidebar
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing students for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MT5 Integration fully tested. Key points: (1) ADMIN_CS_ROLES = {super_admin, admin, cs_head, cs_head_, customer_service, customer_service_, cs_agent} - mentors excluded, (2) MT5 sync returns auth_failed because broker hasn't enabled Web API access yet - this is expected, (3) Fixed bug in link-student endpoint where projection didn't include 'id' field causing false 'Student not found' errors, (4) Duplicate MT5 account check works correctly (400 error), (5) Auto-sync scheduled for 08:00, 16:00, 00:00 UAE time.

mt5_sync.reason: Web API access not enabled by broker

bug_fixed.description: Fixed link-student endpoint returning 'Student not found' for valid students
bug_fixed.root_cause: MongoDB projection only included mt5_account_number and mt5_account_history fields. When student didn't have these fields, query returned empty dict {} which is falsy in Python
bug_fixed.fix: Added 'id' field to projection and changed check to 'if not student or not student.get("id")'
